summary: A genuinely strong concept for AI-developer streetwear with clear buyer appeal, held back by placeholder-grade typography and linework that is too fine to screen print cleanly.
primary_issues: The headline uses a default geometric sans with loose tracking — it reads as a placeholder, not a brand voice, and gives the design no authority.
Several elements rely on sub-1pt linework and fine stipple detail that will fill in or break up on a screen-printed cotton tee.
recommended_fixes: Replace the headline with a heavy grotesque and tighten tracking for presence.
Raise minimum stroke weight to ~2.5pt and remove the finest texture so the art survives screen print.
next_action: Regenerate with the heavier headline and simplified, print-safe linework, then re-audit before sampling.
